title: Susan Scott
compiled_truth: Susan Scott is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-09-06), Susan Scott sent 2287 and received 1573 emails, totalling 3860 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeffery Fawcett](people/jeffery-fawcett) (217), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (159), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (153), [Mary Miller](people/mary-miller) (144), [Glen Hass](people/glen-hass) (118). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, enron_power, inbox, projects, sent.
